findings.description: The XML code example for ComplexRequestResponseProcessor was silently modified. The source has `<component class="nablarch.test.core.http.RequestResponseCookieManager"/>` (self-closing tag) followed by `<property .../>` and `</component>`, whereas the knowledge file renders it as `<component class="nablarch.test.core.http.RequestResponseCookieManager">` (opening tag). Although the source XML is structurally malformed, the knowledge file altered the code content without basis.
findings.source_evidence:
Source: `<component class="nablarch.test.core.http.RequestResponseCookieManager"/>
  <property name="cookieName" value="JSESSIONID"/>
</component>` — Knowledge file: `<component class="nablarch.test.core.http.RequestResponseCookieManager">
  <property name="cookieName" value="JSESSIONID"/>
</component>`
